Workflow.name: SingleAccountAggregation
Workflow.Description: This workflow is run based on input of a QuickLink Form which gathers a Native Identity and Application for which to aggregate a single account

Section.label: Enter the Native Identity and Application for Aggregation
Section.name: secGetIdentityandApplication

Field.helpKey: This could be a any id, etc. (Whatever is defined as the Application Schema 'Identity Attribute')
Field.name: nativeIdentity

Step.name: Wait
Step.Description: Added Wait step in order to background the workflow. This has to be done after the form has been completed, otherwise a workitem is automatically generated, even if the user clicks cancel on the form.
